zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Kirketon於大約1304年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾波斯頓時，她的父親Robert de Kirkton31歲，母親Beatrix Driby31歲。她於1322年2月與Sir John le Brett結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1344年10月9日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Kirketon于大约1304年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾波斯頓时，她的父亲Robert de Kirkton31岁，母亲Beatrix Driby31岁。她于1322年2月与Sir John le Brett结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1344年10月9日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓。

nameMeanings.name: Kirketon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Scottish: locative name from any of numerous places in Scotland so called, named as ‘church settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Kirketon was born about 1304, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Kirkton, was 31 and her mother, Beatrix Driby, was 31. She married Sir John le Brett in February 1322. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 October 1344, in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Kirketon est née environ 1304, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Kirkton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Driby, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John le Brett en février 1322. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 octobre 1344, à Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Wiverton Hall, Nottinghamshire, England,: Wiverton Hall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Kirketon um 1304 in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Kirkton 31 und ihre Mutter Beatrix Driby 31. Sie hat im Februar 1322 Sir John le Brett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Oktober 1344 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Kirketon è nata il circa 1304 nel Boston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Kirkton, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Beatrix Driby, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir John le Brett nel febbraio 1322. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 ottobre 1344, nel Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Kirketonが約1304年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンで生まれた時，父Robert de Kirktonは31歳，母Beatrix Dribyは31歳であった。1322年2月にSir John le Brettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1344年10月9日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロウドハムで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Kirketon(이)가 대략 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Kirkton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Driby(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1322년 2월 Sir John le Brett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 10월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 로드함에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Kirketon nasceu aproximadamente 1304, em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Kirkton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Driby, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John le Brett em fevereiro de 1322. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de outubro de 1344, em Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Kirketon родилась около 1304 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Kirkton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Driby, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John le Brett февраль 1322 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 октября 1344 г. в местности лоудхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir John le Brett en febrero de 1322. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de octubre de 1344, en Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
